mapper.insert: INSERT INTO organizations (id, name, description, plan, box_limit, allow_public_join, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{description}, #{plan, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.OrganizationPlanTypeHandler}, #{boxLimit}, #{allowPublicJoin}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.name, o.description, o.plan, o.box_limit, o.allow_public_join, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM organizations o INNER JOIN organization_members om ON o.id = om.organization_id WHERE om.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE organizations SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, plan = #{plan, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.OrganizationPlanTypeHandler}, box_limit = #{boxLimit}, allow_public_join = #{allowPublicJoin}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM organizations WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
